photos.caption: The big table at the foot of the king-size bed can easily convert to a big dinner table with all the seats available in Your Aerie, plus the cotton tablecloth and napkins stored in the kitchen.

A view of the living room, into the kitchen on the right, and the hallway to the bathroom on the left. The door to the Queen room is to the left of the couch. If you were taking this pic, the King room would be behind you.

The King room is large, with a very comfortable king-size memory foam bed, bookshelves, dresser, closet, large table (enough space to pull out and use for work and dining). The wood plantation shutters close tightly.

Your fridge and kitchen pantry. You might be happy to see some food supplies after your long journey. Coffee, tea, soups, pasta, juice, eggs, bread, butter, snacks, fruit, half-and-half cream, beer, wine. Just enter Your Aerie and relax. Take a bath.

Your private, nicely stocked kitchen. Let us surprise you, as we try to stock items that we think will most appeal to the individual groups coming to stay in Your Aerie. But rest assured--you won't go hungry here.
Lots of books located in the King room to enjoy, exchange.

You are welcome to put your feet up on the big coffee table while you watch a movie or a game. Look inside the drawers to see what toys and games we and our guests have stashed in there. The couch is also pretty comfortable to sleep on.

The Living Room view into the Master Bedroom. The TV monitor is much bigger now than what this pic shows. There's a huge variety of sports, reg. TV channels,  movies, documentaries, music choices:  an embarrassment of riches if you want to chill.

The shower/extra-deep tub are to your right in this photo of the roomy bathroom.  We provide a variety of nice products for skin and hair care, as well as lots of fluffy towels. Go ahead -- climb into the tub and take a long, indulgent soak.  Relax.
